blockers.note: Accepted by the user's explicit full-scope authorization on 2026-06-18. Earlier signup attempts hit Supabase Auth HTTP 429. The parent closeout retry used a redacted example.com address and returned HTTP 400 invalid email instead. Signup/full-journey submit was not attempted to avoid third-party email, personal email, or an external Auth request. This is an accepted release risk, not a successful signup proof; humans must continue to treat signup as residual release risk even though release doctor does not mechanically STOP on it.
